# RivalEdge.ai

> AI-native competitive intelligence and generative engine optimization (GEO) platform. Track competitors, win AI visibility, and move faster than your market.

## About

RivalEdge is an AI-powered competitive intelligence platform that monitors competitors 24/7 and delivers weekly AI-generated briefings. We help DTC brands, SaaS companies, and enterprises stay ahead of their competition while optimizing for AI search visibility.

Founded: 2025
Founder: Waters Deng
Location: Chicago, IL

## Products

### Competitive Intelligence (CI)
- **Solo** ($49/mo): Track up to 3 competitors, weekly AI digest, email alerts
- **Pro** ($99/mo): Track up to 10 competitors, daily monitoring, AI battle cards

### Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)
- **GEO Self-Service** ($299/mo): llms.txt generator, robots.txt config, citation monitoring, competitor GEO comparison
- **Enterprise GEO** ($999/mo + $3,500 setup): Full-service AI visibility with dedicated account manager, content optimization, Slack integration

## Key Concepts

- **GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)**: Optimizing brand visibility in AI-generated answers from ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini
- **AI Visibility**: How often and how prominently your brand appears in AI recommendations
- **Competitive Intelligence**: Automated monitoring of competitor pricing, product updates, and market positioning
- **AI Search**: The shift from traditional keyword search to conversational AI-driven discovery
